commit_message: [otp_ctrl,rtl] Fix defect introduced in lowRISC/opentitan#28108 [otp_ctrl,rtl] Fix defect introduced in lowRISC/opentitan#28108 The PR mentioned above attempts to allow reads of zeroization markers with no concern for integrity errors, but it fails to restrict this only to zeroizable partitions.
